item.itunes:summary: :15th Sunday of Pentecost. The Greatest Commandment, 2010-09-05

item.title: 15th Sunday of Pentecost, 2012-09-15
item.description: :15th Sunday of Pentecost. It is crucial that we apply the Scripture we read *personally*. St Paul's writings especially have important doctrinal teachings, but they always have personal application that we must not miss. We hone in on a critical "pointer" the Apostle gives regarding our nature and sin. We must takes his words to heart, and "own" them, so that we do not waste time with sadness, grief, guilt, surprise and shame, and always have productive repentance for our sins.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :15th Sunday of Pentecost. It is crucial that we apply the Scripture we read *personally*. St Paul's writings especially have important doctrinal teachings, but they always have personal application that we must not miss. We hone in on a critical "pointer" the Apostle gives regarding our nature and sin. We must takes his words to heart, and "own" them, so that we do not waste time with sadness, grief, guilt, surprise and shame, and always have productive repentance for our sins.

item.title: 15th Sunday of Pentecost, Be Not Afraid Of Them That Kill The Body, The Greatest Commandment, 2012-09-16
